zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de CHATILLON於1218年7月7日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也科利尼時，她的父親Guy II de Saint Pol22歲，母親Agnès de Donzy II17歲。她與Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布爾波-藍希結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年2月5日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de CHATILLON于1218年7月7日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也科利尼时，她的父亲Guy II de Saint Pol22岁，母亲Agnès de Donzy II17岁。她与Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布爾波-藍希结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年2月5日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de CHATILLON was born on 7 July 1218, in Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guy II de Saint Pol, was 22 and her mother, Agnès de Donzy II, was 17. She married Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX in Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 5 February 1254, in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de CHATILLON est née le 7 juillet 1218, à Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guy II de Saint Pol, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Donzy II, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX à Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1254, à Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de CHATILLON am 7. Juli 1218 in Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy II de Saint Pol 22 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Donzy II 17. Sie hat in Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1254 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de CHATILLON è nata il il 7 luglio 1218 nel Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guy II de Saint Pol, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Donzy II, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX nel Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1254, nel Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de CHATILLONが1218年7月7日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールチaティロンで生まれた時，父Guy II de Saint Polは22歳，母Agnès de Donzy IIは17歳であった。フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーボウルボン-ランシでArchambaud de DAMPIERRE IXと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年2月5日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールソウヴィグニーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de CHATILLON(이)가 1218년 7월 7일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 cha틸런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy II de Saint Pol(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Donzy II(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 부르보-랭시에서 Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 2월 5일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 소우비그니에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.7 JUL 1218–5 FEB 1254: 1218 оны Долоодугаар сарын 7–1254 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 5

pt.7 JUL 1218–5 FEB 1254: 7 de julho de 1218–5 de fevereiro de 1254
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de CHATILLON nasceu em 7 de julho de 1218, em Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guy II de Saint Pol, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Donzy II, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX em Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1254, em Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de CHATILLON родилась 7 июля 1218 г. в местности чaтиллон, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy II de Saint Pol было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Donzy II, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX в местности бурбон-ланси, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 февраля 1254 г. в местности соувигни, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.7 JUL 1218–5 FEB 1254: 7 de julio de 1218–5 de febrero de 1254
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de CHATILLON nació el 7 de julio de 1218, en Châtillon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guy II de Saint Pol, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnès de Donzy II, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX en Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1254, en Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
